questions:
=== NOVELTY SUMMARY ===
Primary Novel Feature: The invention proposes a new method for improving luminance uniformity across all operating modes in an LED display. This is achieved by modifying the dot pattern geometry and controlling the light extraction structure.
Supporting Features:
- New optical architecture design
- Dot size gradient modification
- Depth, spacing, and density variation optimization

=== QUESTIONS ===
[Structural Design and Optical Architecture]
1. Can you provide a top view diagram of the proposed LED display structure? Please include the dimensions (in mm) and thickness profile of each optical element.
2. How does the new optical architecture design improve luminance uniformity across all operating modes? Can you provide governing equations or mathematical models defining the extraction pattern?
3. What is the material selection for the optical elements in the proposed LED display structure? Can you compare its performance to prior art in terms of uniformity (percentage) and efficiency (percentage)?

[Light Extraction Structure]
1. What are the dimensions (in µm/mm) of the dot pattern in the proposed LED display? How does the size gradient modification affect light extraction efficiency?
2. Can you provide a cross-sectional diagram of the light extraction structure in the proposed LED display? Please include the depth, spacing, and density variation optimization details.
3. How does the new dot pattern geometry control the light extraction structure to improve luminance uniformity across all operating modes? Can you compare its performance to prior art in terms of efficiency (percentage) and thickness reduction?

[Luminance Uniformity]
1. How is luminance uniformity maintained across all operating modes in the proposed LED display? Can you provide a test data set showing measured uniformity percentages for different modes of operation?
2. What is the angular distribution of light in the proposed LED display? Can you compare its performance to prior art in terms of angle coverage (degrees)?
3. Can you provide simulation tools and design methodology used for optical optimization of the proposed LED display structure? How does it differ from prior art techniques?
